title: alsophila borbonica
intro: Alsophila borbonica, also known as the Mountain Fern, is a species of plant in the fern family (Cyatheaceae) native to the island of Réunion. The medicinal properties of Alsophila borbonica include its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antiseptic, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels, as well as its antioxidant properties. Alsophila borbonica is traditionally prepared as a tea or tincture, and is also used in herbal remedies to treat various health issues.
